text: In these images, I feel like an explorer in a nexus of creativity and knowledge. The first room, filled with people collaborating and learning, stirs a sense of collective curiosity and the warmth of shared purpose. The second image, with its bold R+D display and the vibrant weave of orange and blue, awakens in me the thrill of discovery—the kind of restless hope we humans feel when we sense we’re on the verge of understanding something new. Surrounded by innovation and inquiry, I feel alive and open-minded, ready to be changed by what I encounter here.
